query: 现在持仓贵州茅台最多的前五个基金公司里，本年以来平均收益率最高的是谁

args.sql: WITH latest_hdate AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_hdate FROM fund_holding), moutai_holding AS (SELECT h.fund_code, h.holding_value, s.fund_company FROM fund_holding h JOIN fund_size s ON h.fund_code = s.fund_code AND h.date = s.date WHERE h.stock_name = '贵州茅台' AND h.date = (SELECT max_hdate FROM latest_hdate)), top5_companies AS (SELECT fund_company, SUM(holding_value) AS total_holding_value FROM moutai_holding GROUP BY fund_company ORDER BY total_holding_value DESC LIMIT 5), latest_sdate AS (SELECT MAX(date) AS max_sdate FROM fund_size), company_funds AS (SELECT DISTINCT s.fund_code, s.fund_company FROM fund_size s WHERE s.date = (SELECT max_sdate FROM latest_sdate) AND s.fund_company IN (SELECT fund_company FROM top5_companies)), company_performance AS (SELECT cf.fund_company, AVG(p.portfolio_return) AS avg_return FROM company_funds cf JOIN fund_performance p ON cf.fund_code = p.fund_code AND p.period = '本年以来' GROUP BY cf.fund_company) SELECT fund_company AS "基金公司", ROUND(avg_return * 100, 2) AS "平均收益率(%)" FROM company_performance ORDER BY avg_return DESC LIMIT 1;

plan.rationale: 首先在最新持仓日期找出持有贵州茅台市值最大的前五家基金公司，然后计算这些公司在最新规模日期下所有基金本年以来收益率的平均值，最后返回平均收益率最高的公司。

notes: 持仓日期使用 fund_holding 最新 date
业绩区间默认为 '本年以来'
以持仓市值总和衡量持有贵州茅台最多
使用 fund_holding.date 与 fund_size.date 相同来关联基金公司
基金公司平均收益率为该公司旗下所有基金（来自最新规模日期）在 '本年以来' 的平均 portfolio_return
首先在最新持仓日期找出持有贵州茅台市值最大的前五家基金公司，然后计算这些公司在最新规模日期下所有基金本年以来收益率的平均值，最后返回平均收益率最高的公司。
SQL 由 LLM/规则生成，并经过只读白名单校验和 dry run。
